name: Documentation update
about: Suggest improvements to project documentation

---

## Documentation issue

A clear and concise description of the documentation issue or improvement needed.

## Current documentation

Link to the current documentation that needs to be updated or improved.

## Proposed changes

Describe the changes you would like to see made to the documentation.

## Additional context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the documentation improvement.

## Type of documentation

- [ ] README
- [ ] Contributing guide
- [ ] Security policy
- [ ] Privacy policy
- [ ] Attribution policy
- [ ] Deployment documentation
- [ ] Runbooks
- [ ] Release documentation
- [ ] API/tool documentation
- [ ] Architecture documentation
- [ ] Other (please specify)
